# Playpile

> A pile of playful, original web experiments and classic logic puzzles — sudoku, tectonic, kakuro, futoshiki, and hand-built daily games.

Playpile is a small collection of browser games. It mixes original
daily games (rank anything, signal, timeline builder, reality check,
how big, one decision) with freshly-painted classic logic puzzles
(sudoku, tectonic, kakuro, futoshiki). Each game has its own daily
puzzle and an archive of past days.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Browse all games — originals and classics.

## Games

- [Signal](/play/signal): Original daily game.
- [Rank Anything](/play/rank-anything): Drag items into the right order.
- [Build Your Own](/play/build-your-own): Build a daily creation.
- [How Big](/play/how-big): Estimate sizes and scales.
- [Timeline Builder](/play/timeline-builder): Place events on a timeline.
- [Reality Check](/play/reality-check): Guess what's real.
- [One Decision](/play/one-decision): One choice, lots of consequences.
- [Mix Morph](/play/mix-morph): Blend things into new things.
- [Sudoku](/play/sudoku): Classic 9×9 number puzzle.
- [Tectonic](/play/tectonic): Region-based number logic puzzle.
- [Kakuro](/play/kakuro): Crossword-style number sums.
- [Futoshiki](/play/futoshiki): Inequality-based latin square.

## Archives

- [Signal archive](/archive/signal): Past daily Signal puzzles.
- [Sudoku archive](/archive/sudoku): Past daily Sudoku puzzles.
- [Tectonic archive](/archive/tectonic): Past daily Tectonic puzzles.
